title: Corporate Loan Agreement — TechCorp SA
content_summary: 5M EUR loan, 5 year term, floating rate EURIBOR+2.1%, collateral: IP assets and receivables. Borrower has existing debt covenant at 3x EBITDA. Cross-default clause linked to parent company obligations. Change of control clause triggers mandatory prepayment.

title: GDPR Data Processing Agreement — AnalyticsPro Ltd
content_summary: Data processing terms with third-party analytics vendor. EU data residency required under Art. 44 GDPR. Sub-processor list includes 3 US-based cloud providers. Standard Contractual Clauses in Annex C. Data retention: 24 months. Breach notification: 48 hours.

title: MiFID II Client Suitability Assessment — Retail Client
content_summary: Retail client investment profile, moderate risk appetite, equity products approved up to 40% portfolio allocation. Annual income: 85,000 EUR. Experience: 5 years retail investing. Excluded products: leveraged derivatives, structured products above complexity level 3.

title: DORA ICT Third-Party Risk Agreement — CloudCore Inc
content_summary: Cloud infrastructure contract for core banking workloads. Provider is US-based — data residency SLA requires EU-only processing. DORA Art.28 mandatory clauses present but audit rights clause is insufficiently broad. Exit strategy and concentration risk not adequately addressed. Contract missing Business Continuity requirements per DORA RTS.

title: Basel IV Capital Adequacy Framework — Internal Policy
content_summary: Updated capital adequacy calculation methodology under CRR III output floor. Credit risk: standardised approach for SME exposures below 1M EUR. Operational risk: Business Indicator Approach adopted. Market risk: revised FRTB standards. Leverage ratio: 3% minimum maintained. Implementation deadline: January 2027.
